text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, June 15. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
